brand.name: ZERO-ONE
brand.lead: An innovation-driven company focused on intelligent robotics and IoT — delivering integrated hardware-and-software solutions across mobile charging robots and low-altitude VTOL aircraft.
brand.vision: Reliable energy for every robot — propelling the future of intelligent manufacturing and automation.

products.title: Product Matrix
products.subtitle: From ground to low-altitude — core mobile-energy and intelligent platforms.

items.name: Mobile Charging Robot
items.desc: A self-driving mobile charging platform — onboard battery moves to target locations and delivers efficient, intelligent charging to robots and equipment, with multi-fleet scheduling, visualized status and remote operations.

items.name: VTOL Aircraft
items.desc: A new generation of VTOL aircraft fused with our mobile-energy tech, extending intelligent operations into low-altitude airspace.

tech.title: In-house Technology
tech.subtitle: Hardware, energy, cloud — owned end to end.

homeCapabilities.title: Technical capabilities
homeCapabilities.subtitle: Core technology for robotics and IoT — keeping every device truly connected.

items.title: Remote device monitoring
items.desc: Real-time visibility into every device's status and location via our IoT platform.

items.title: Smart charging dispatch
items.desc: Allocates charging resources across multi-robot fleets to maximize uptime.

items.title: Multi-surface dashboards
items.desc: PC, mobile and large-screen views with all the metrics that matter.

items.title: Ground + low-altitude sync
items.desc: Unified scheduling and data links between mobile robots and aerial devices.

solutions.title: Applications
solutions.subtitle: Intelligent solutions across delivery, inspection, security and low-altitude logistics — built on our in-house IoT stack.

scenarios.name: Last-mile Delivery
scenarios.headline: Unattended ground delivery
scenarios.desc: Mobile robots paired with auto-docking charging stations enable 7×24 unattended operations across offices, campuses, hotels and hospitals.

scenarios.name: Industrial Inspection
scenarios.headline: Autonomous patrol
scenarios.desc: Robots inspect production lines, server rooms and substations on schedule — streaming video and sensor data with real-time anomaly alerts.

scenarios.name: Campus Security
scenarios.headline: Around-the-clock guard
scenarios.desc: 24/7 security robots combine computer vision with remote operations to expand surveillance coverage across campuses and industrial sites.

scenarios.name: Low-altitude Logistics
scenarios.headline: VTOL applications
scenarios.desc: Built on our in-house VTOL platform — exploring short-range aerial logistics, emergency dispatch and urban low-altitude use cases.

features.title: Vertical takeoff & landing
features.desc: No runway needed — operates from tight launch and landing zones.

features.title: Long endurance
features.desc: Efficient energy management and aerodynamics extend flight time.

features.title: Multi-payload

about.title: About Zero-One Innovation
about.lead: A technology company focused on intelligent robotics and IoT.
about.body:
Zero-One Innovation is a technology company dedicated to intelligent robotics and the Internet of Things. We deliver efficient, intelligent charging solutions for robots, and our in-house remote-monitoring platform lets operators track fleet status in real time and run operations more efficiently.

Across our two product lines — Mobile Charging Robots and VTOL Aircraft — backed by our in-house IoT and remote-monitoring platform, we invest deeply in energy management, autonomous navigation and multi-fleet coordination, advancing intelligent manufacturing and automation.
about.techDesc: Ongoing R&D in energy management, autonomous navigation, our IoT platform and VTOL systems.
